_INSTRUCTIONS.step1: Run scripts/keygen.sh on EACH validator VPS to get addresses and BLS keys
_INSTRUCTIONS.step2: Run deploy/genesis-fill.sh (interactive wizard) OR manually replace FILL_* values below
_INSTRUCTIONS.step3: Copy this file to all validator nodes as config/mainnet-genesis.json
_INSTRUCTIONS.step5: Coordinate with all validators — verify genesis_hash matches on all nodes

validators._note: Validator 1 — Genesis node operated by Zebvix Technologies
validators.name: Zebvix-Val-1

validators._note: Validator 4 — Genesis node (min 4 for BFT quorum)
validators.name: Zebvix-Val-4

allocations._note: Foundation Multisig — use Gnosis Safe (6-of-10 recommended)
allocations.comment: Foundation (6.66%): ZBX for dev, ops, ecosystem

allocations._note: ZbxAMM pool — deploy immutable ownerless contract first, use that address
allocations.comment: AMM genesis liquidity seed (13.33%): 20M ZBX — no admin, no pause, no upgrade

allocations._note: Governance Treasury — use Gnosis Safe or ZbxGovernor timelock address
Team Vesting Contract — deploy VestingWallet contract, use that address
Ecosystem Grants — multisig controlled by ecosystem committee

token_allocations._note: ADMIN pre-mint — 20M ZUSD to foundation for AMM ZBX/ZUSD pool seeding
token_allocations._how: No collateral needed at genesis — admin_mint bypasses ZusdVault collateral check
token_allocations.comment: Admin pre-mint: 100,000,000 ZUSD → foundation → add to AMM pool at launch

token_allocations._note: Treasury ZUSD reserve — for lending protocol stability + liquidity ops

zusd._note: ZUSD genesis config — ZusdVault is the only allowed minter post-genesis

admin_mint._note: One-time genesis privilege — disabled after block 1
admin_mint.comment: 100,000,000 ZUSD minted at genesis block (no collateral required)

contracts._note: Pre-deployed system contracts at fixed addresses

ZbxEntryPoint.comment: ERC-4337 EntryPoint — deploy-contracts.sh mainnet fills this

ZbxOracle.comment: Price Oracle — deploy-contracts.sh mainnet fills this

RewardPool.comment: Validator reward pool — deploy-contracts.sh mainnet fills this

ZusdVault.comment: ZUSD minting vault — admin_mint enabled only at genesis

burn._note: Deflationary burn — 10% of every tx fee burned permanently until max cap reached
burn._max_burn_note: 75,000,000 ZBX max burn cap (50% of 150M total supply). Burning stops after this.

fee_distribution._note: How each transaction fee is split (basis points, total = 10000)

mining._note: 3.0 ZBX per block, halving every ~25M blocks (~3.97 years at 5s/block)

staking._note: 100 ZBX minimum to become a validator, 10 ZBX minimum per delegator
staking._min_validator_human: 100 ZBX minimum to become a validator

amm._note: ZBX AMM — fully decentralized, ownerless, immutable pool
amm._swap_fee_note: 0.30% swap fee — hardcoded, nobody can change it (not even admin)

swap_limits._note: Anti-whale protection — enforced at contract level, nobody can bypass
swap_limits._max_buy_human: 50,000 ZBX max per single swap transaction
swap_limits._max_sell_human: 50,000 ZBX max per single sell transaction
swap_limits._max_impact_note: Max 15% price impact per swap — tx reverts if slippage exceeds this
swap_limits._cooldown_note: No per-wallet cooldown (anti-whale handled by per-tx limit only)

access_control._note: No admin key, no multisig, no timelock — pure code-is-law. Limits are hardcoded.

deployment.renounce_tx: ownership renounced in deployment tx (constructor sets owner=address(0))
